phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para comprar entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah PAH-rah kohm-PRAHR ehn-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: Tras el Claustro Grande, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: TRAHS EHL klah-OO-stroh GRAHN-deh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the patio, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the patio, on the left.
responses.phonetic: TRAHS EHL klah-OO-stroh GRAHN-deh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Tras el Claustro Grande, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the church interior is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme cómo entrar al interior de la iglesia?
phrases.pronunciation: Poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh KOH-moh en-TRAR al een-teh-ree-OR deh lah ee-GLEH-see-ah?

likely_response.local: Siga recto hasta la puerta principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh AH-stah LAH poo-EHR-tah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight to the main door.

responses.english: Go straight to the main door.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh AH-stah LAH poo-EHR-tah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Siga recto hasta la puerta principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the monk community area is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde se encuentra la zona de la comunidad?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-day seh en-koo-EN-trah lah SOH-nah deh lah koh-moo-nee-DAHT?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, pero el acceso es restringido.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh PEH-roh EHL ahth-THEH-soh EHS reh-streen-HEE-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, but access is restricted.

responses.english: At the back, but access is restricted.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh PEH-roh EHL ahth-THEH-soh EHS reh-streen-HEE-doh
responses.french: Al fondo, pero el acceso es restringido.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to book guided tours
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo reservar visitas guiadas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-ser-BAR vee-SEE-tahs gee-AH-dahs

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, al fondo a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, at the back on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, at the back on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la taquilla, al fondo a la derecha.
